Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPFPT1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; ; ; SRCHPAT(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Search for Patient N RES,PARAMS,DVPINDX,DVPVAL,DVPCNT,DVPRES,DFN,PAT,RSLTCNT,RECMAX,SMRY S (RSLTCNT,DVPCNT,SMRY)=0,DFN="",RECMAX=100 D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS) ; S X="" F S X=$O(QUERYPAR(X)) Q:X="" D . I X="address",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D ADDRESS($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="addresscity",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D CITY($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="addresscountry",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D COUNTRY($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="addresspostalcode",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D ZIP($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="addressstate",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D STATE($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="addressuse",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D USE($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="birthdate",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D DOB($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="deathdate",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D DOD($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="deceased",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D DECEASE($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="email",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D EMAIL($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="family",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D NAME($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),X,$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="gender",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D GENDER($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="generalpractitioner",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D PRACT("",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="given",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D NAME($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),X,$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="identifier",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D IDENT($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="language",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D LANGUAGE($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="link",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D LINK("",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="name",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D NAME($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),X,$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="organization",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D ORG($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="phone",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D PHONE($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="phonetic",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D PHONETIC($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q . I X="telecom",$P(QUERYPAR(X),U)]"" D TELECOM($P(QUERYPAR(X),U),$P(QUERYPAR(X),U,2)) Q ; ;Check _summary status S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ; ; Get Patient List N RSLTARY F S DFN=$O(DVPRES(DFN)) Q:DFN="" D . S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=DFN N PAGING S DFN="" D:+DVPCNT>0 . D PAGING^DVPUTLS(DVPCNT,.PAGING) . I DVPCNT>RECMAX,$P($G(QUERYPAR("page")),U)="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("count")),U)="" D . . N NODE S PAGING("REND")=RECMAX,NODE=$NA(@TARGET@("results","warning","OperationOutcome","issue","severity")) . . S @NODE@("severity")="warning" . . S @NODE@("code")="too-costly" . . S @NODE@("details")="" ; Operation Outcome Codes . . S @NODE@("diagnostics")="The query returned too many records. The result will be trimmed to "_RECMAX_" records. Consider using paging." . . S @NODE@("location")="SRCHPAT^DVPFPT1" . F RSLTCNT=PAGING("RSTART"):1:PAGING("REND") Q:RSLTCNT=0 D . . D FHIRPAT^DVPFPT(RSLTARY(RSLTCNT),.PAT,SMRY) . . S @TARGET@("results","bundle","entry","resource","resourceType")="Patient" . . M @TARGET@("results","bundle","entry","resource",RSLTCNT)=PAT S @TARGET@("results","bundle","total")=DVPCNT S @TARGET@("results","bundle","type")="searchset" D MRGPGNG^DVPUTLS Q ; ADDRESS(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Address Q ; CITY(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for City Q ; COUNTRY(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Country Q ; ZIP(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Zip Q ; STATE(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for State Q ; USE(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Use Q ; DOB(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Date of Birth N DFN,DOB,MATCH,NAME Q:VALUE="" S (MATCH,DFN)=0 ; DOB is expected to be in FileMan format I VALUE["-" S VALUE=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(VALUE) ; First check if other params have found matching entries I $D(DVPRES) D Q . S DFN="" F S DFN=$O(DVPRES(DFN)) Q:'DFN D . . S NAME=DVPRES(DFN),DOB=$P(^DPT(DFN,0),U,3) . . ; Check for valid matches on year, month and day . . I MOD="contains" S MATCH=$S($E(DOB,1,3)=$E(VALUE,1,3):1,$E(DOB,4,5)=$E(VALUE,4,5):1,$E(DOB,6,7)=$E(VALUE,6,7):1,1:0) . . I 'MATCH K DVPRES(DFN) ; ; Find matches for value S DOB="" F S DOB=$O(^DPT("ADOB",DOB)) Q:DOB="" D . F S DFN=$O(^DPT("ADOB",DOB,DFN)) Q:'DFN D . . Q:$$CHKPAT(DFN)<0 . . ; Exact match found . . I DOB=VALUE S DVPRES(DFN)=$P(^DPT(DFN,0),U) Q . . ; Check for valid matches on year, month and day . . I MOD="contains" S MATCH=$S($E(DOB,1,3)=($E(VALUE,1,3)):1,$E(DOB,4,5)=($E(VALUE,4,5)):1,$E(DOB,6,7)=($E(VALUE,6,7)):1,1:0) . . I MATCH S DVPRES(DFN)=$P(^DPT(DFN,0),U) S MATCH=0 Q ; DOD(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Date of Death Q ; DECEASE(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Deceased Q ; EMAIL(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for email Q ; GENDER(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Gender N DFN,GENDER,NAME Q:VALUE="" ; Gender is a coded value of (M,F) I $L(VALUE)>1 S VALUE=$$UP^XLFSTR($E(VALUE,1)) S DFN=0 ; First check if other params have found matching entries I $D(DVPRES) D Q . S DFN="" F S DFN=$O(DVPRES(DFN)) Q:'DFN D . . S NAME=DVPRES(DFN),GENDER=$P(^DPT(DFN,0),U,2) . . ; Check for valid matches on year, month and day . . I GENDER'=VALUE K DVPRES(DFN) ; ; Find matches for value S GENDER="" F S GENDER=$O(^DPT("ASX",GENDER)) Q:GENDER="" D . F S DFN=$O(^DPT("ASX",GENDER,DFN)) Q:'DFN D . . Q:$$CHKPAT(DFN)<0 . . ; Exact match found . . I GENDER=VALUE S DVPRES(DFN)=$P(^DPT(DFN,0),U) Q Q ; PRACT(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for General Practitioner Q ; IDENT(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Identifier (SSN only supported) N DFN,SSN,NAME Q:VALUE="" S DFN=0 ; First check if other params have found matching entries I $D(DVPRES) D Q . S DFN="" F S DFN=$O(DVPRES(DFN)) Q:'DFN D . . S NAME=DVPRES(DFN),SSN=$P(^DPT(DFN,0),U,9) . . ; Check for valid matches on year, month and day . . I SSN'=VALUE K DVPRES(DFN) ; ; Find matches for value S SSN="" F S SSN=$O(^DPT("SSN",SSN)) Q:SSN="" D . F S DFN=$O(^DPT("SSN",SSN,DFN)) Q:'DFN D . . Q:$$CHKPAT(DFN)<0 . . ; Exact match found . . I SSN=VALUE S DVPRES(DFN)=$P(^DPT(DFN,0),U) Q . . ; Check for valid matches on SSN . . I MOD="contains" I SSN[VALUE S DVPRES(DFN)=$P(^DPT(DFN,0),U) Q ; LANGUAGE(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Language Q ; LINK(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Link Q ; ORG(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Organization Q ; PHONE(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Phone Q ; PHONETIC(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for Phonetic Q ; TELECOM(VALUE,MOD) ; Search for telecom Q ; NAME(VALUE,PARAM,MOD) ; Search for value in name fields ; INPUT: VALUE = The name value to search ; PARAM = The search parameter (name,given,family) ; MOD = The search modifier N X,NAME,DFN,NAMECOMP,MATCH Q:VALUE="" S (MATCH,DFN)=0 ; Make sure name is in upper case for VistA compatibility S VALUE=$$UP^XLFSTR(VALUE) ; ; Full name search for exact name I PARAM="name",(MOD=""!(MOD="exact")) D Q:DFN . S DFN=$O(^DPT("B",VALUE,0)) . Q:$$CHKPAT(DFN)<0 . I DFN S DVPRES(DFN)=VALUE Q ; ; First check if other params have found matching entries I $D(DVPRES) D Q . S DFN="" F S DFN=$O(DVPRES(DFN)) Q:'DFN D . . S (NAME,NAMECOMP)=DVPRES(DFN) D NAMECOMP^XLFNAME(.NAMECOMP) . . ; Check for valid matches . . S MATCH=$S(PARAM="name"&(NAME[VALUE):1,PARAM="given"&(NAMECOMP("GIVEN")[VALUE):1,PARAM="family"&(NAMECOMP("FAMILY")[VALUE):1,1:0) . . I 'MATCH K DVPRES(DFN) ; ; Find matches for value S NAME="" F S NAME=$O(^DPT("B",NAME)) Q:NAME="" D . S DFN=$O(^DPT("B",NAME,0)) . Q:$$CHKPAT(DFN)<0 . ; Get name components . S NAMECOMP=NAME D NAMECOMP^XLFNAME(.NAMECOMP) . ; Check for valid matches for the contains modifier . S DFN=$S(PARAM="name"&(NAME[VALUE):DFN,PARAM="given"&(NAMECOMP("GIVEN")[VALUE):DFN,PARAM="family"&(NAMECOMP("FAMILY")[VALUE):DFN,1:0) . I DFN S DVPRES(DFN)=NAME Q ; CHKPAT(DFN) ; Check if the patient has a valid ICN before including in result set Q $$GETICN^MPIF001(DFN) ; UPDPAT(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Update Patient Data N RES,FDA,FDAIEN,SUCCESS,IEN,NAME,MSG N X F X="patientId","telecomMobile","telecomWork" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) S IEN=$G(PATIENTI) ;I IEN']"" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(400,"patientId is required","$$UPDPAT^DVPFPT1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; Set up IENS S IENS=IEN_"," ; Update mobile phone number field I $D(TELECOMM) D . D SETFDA(.134,IENS,TELECOMM) ; Update work phone number field I $D(TELECOMW) D . D SETFDA(.132,IENS,TELECOMW) D UPDATE^DIE("","FDA","FDAIEN","MSG(2)") ; If an error occured, get the error code and text from the results and build error node I $D(MSG(2,"DIERR")) M @RESULTS=MSG(2) D ERROR^DVPUTL(RESULTS,"$$UPDPAT^DVPFPT1") Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() S @TARGET@("results","responseCode")=200 Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; SETFDA(FIELD,IENS,VALUE) ; Set up the FDA array S FDA(2,IENS,FIELD)=VALUE Q
